title: Flowering Crops Growth Marker
description: Adds distinct flowers to fully aged crops.
body:
![All 5 Flowering Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/725e4a2670f4a058241fc8154e517a5604faf30a.png)

**Adds 5 different flowers to fully aged crops.**


The flowers are based on the real life version! Except for the nether wart... That was based on weeping vines. Designed to look nice on your farm. Only fully grown wheat, beetroot, potatoes, carrots and nether wart will show flowers. Everything else stays the same.



Compatibility:
- Made for Java Edition
- Made for 1.21.6+ but should work on older versions too
- Compatible with most packs as long as they don’t edit crop textures
